summary: Parallel review: FAIL (1 critical, 13 warning, 8 suggestion). Compound gate: PASS

findingsList.text: ЁЯЯб bin/lib/outer-loop.mjs:306 тАФ Agent-brief SPEC template hardcodes seven section headers; render from `PRD_SECTIONS` or add a parity test.
ЁЯЯб bin/lib/outer-loop.mjs:756 тАФ `minimalSpec` template inlines section names; build from `PRD_SECTIONS`.
ЁЯЯб bin/lib/brainstorm-cmd.mjs:62 тАФ Brainstorm scaffold duplicates the section list.
ЁЯЯб bin/lib/brainstorm-cmd.mjs:111 тАФ Second scaffold template with same inline duplication.
ЁЯЯб bin/lib/outer-loop.mjs:306 тАФ `buildSpecBrief` hardcodes the seven section headings; derive from `PRD_SECTIONS`
ЁЯЯб bin/lib/outer-loop.mjs:756 тАФ `minimalSpec` template duplicates the seven headings
ЁЯЯб bin/lib/brainstorm-cmd.mjs:62 тАФ agent-mode brainstorm template duplicates the headings
ЁЯЯб bin/lib/brainstorm-cmd.mjs:111 тАФ interactive brainstorm template duplicates the headings
ЁЯЯб bin/lib/brainstorm-cmd.mjs:60 тАФ Agent-mode brief hardcodes section list; backlog: derive from `PRD_SECTIONS`.
ЁЯЯб bin/lib/brainstorm-cmd.mjs:109 тАФ `buildInteractiveSpec` template hardcodes headings; backlog: drive from `PRD_SECTIONS`.

ЁЯФ┤ bin/lib/run.mjs:933 тАФ Spec-creation path not migrated to `PRD_SECTIONS`; emits a 2-section spec that `validateSpecFile` would reject. Route through a shared `buildMinimalSpec(PRD_SECTIONS)` helper, and add a regression test asserting the file it writes passes `validateSpecFile`.
ЁЯЯб test/spec.test.mjs (missing) тАФ No contract test for the new module. Add: length === 7, deepEqual to canonical ordered list, and `Object.isFrozen(PRD_SECTIONS) === true`.

ЁЯЯб test/outer-loop.test.mjs:244 тАФ No drift test between `PRD_SECTIONS` and the hardcoded section list in `buildSpecBrief` (outer-loop.mjs:306тАУ329) and the priority minimalSpec (outer-loop.mjs:756).
ЁЯЯб test/outer-loop.test.mjs:317 тАФ No negative test that `### Goal` (h3) is rejected; pin the `^##\s+` anchoring so a future regex relaxation is caught.
